# polepeak.com

> Pole training, strength conditioning and plant-based nutrition for people who started from zero. Built by a certified pole teacher who didn't train until 22.

## Home

[Pole Peak — strength is built, not born](https://polepeak.com/): Pole training, strength conditioning and plant-based nutrition for people who started from zero. Built by a certified pole teacher who didn't train until 22.

## Blog

[Pole Conditioning Exercises: 8 Moves to Build Strength (Free PDF) | Pole Peak](https://polepeak.com/blog/pole-conditioning-exercises): Build the pulling, pressing and core strength pole demands — no pole required. 8 at-home pole conditioning exercises with reps, regressions and how each transfers to the pole.
[How to Get Your Cross-Knee Release: Tips to Stop Sliding and Trust the Layback | Pole Peak](https://polepeak.com/blog/cross-knee-release-tips): A step-by-step guide to the cross-knee release on pole — how to lock your skin contact, drive the back leg for security, beat the fear of leaning back, and train it safely. With an interactive walkthrough and troubleshooter.
[Grip Aids for Pole Dance Beginners: What to Use and When · Pole Peak](https://polepeak.com/blog/grip-aids-for-pole-dance-beginners): Sweaty hands, dry skin, or a risky new trick — the grip aid you need changes depending on the problem. Here's what actually works and when to reach for it.
[The Pole Peak Journal — pole, strength, plants & getting started](https://polepeak.com/blog): Honest writing on pole training, off-the-pole strength, plant-based nutrition, flexibility and going from zero to strong. By a certified pole teacher who started at 22.
[The Non-Linear Journey: Why Progress Looks Like a Zig-Zag | Pole Peak](https://polepeak.com/blog/non-linear-fitness-progress): Real fitness progress isn't a straight line — it zig-zags. Why breaks, illness, busy seasons and your cycle cause dips, why that's completely healthy, and how to read your own progress.
[The Solo Training Mindset: How to Stay Focused When Practicing Alone | Pole Peak](https://polepeak.com/blog/home-pole-training-discipline): How to train pole alone and actually stay focused — setting safety boundaries, structuring sessions with timers, and escaping the continuous-recording distraction trap. With an interactive solo session planner.
[Pole Peak — strength is built, not born](https://polepeak.com/blog/blog.html): Pole training, strength conditioning and plant-based nutrition for people who started from zero. Built by a certified pole teacher who didn't train until 22.

## High protein vegan snacks

[High-Protein Snacks for Vegan Athletes | Pole Peak](https://polepeak.com/high-protein-vegan-snacks): Simple, high-protein vegan snacks to fuel real strength — each with serving size, protein and calories, plus a protein target calculator built for athletes.

## Starting pole

[What to expect when you start pole — Pole Peak](https://polepeak.com/starting-pole): An honest, encouraging guide to starting pole: why you won't be good right away, why comparison ruins it, why both sides matter, and what actually speeds up your progress.

## From zero

[I didn't exercise until I was 22 — Pole Peak](https://polepeak.com/from-zero): At 22 I had never really worked out. Then I walked into a pole studio. Here's how one class opened up a whole world of movement — and why I want to help you start too.

## Moves list

[Allegra](https://polepeak.com/moves-list/allegra): Learn the Allegra — an intermediate layback pole move from an outside leg hang. Top tips, prerequisites, and combo ideas. Strength is built, not born.

## High protein red lentil dahl

[The Macro Breakdown: Analyzing a Perfect Post-Training Red Lentil Dahl | Pole Peak](https://polepeak.com/high-protein-red-lentil-dahl): A full macro breakdown of red lentil dahl as a post-training meal — amino-acid pairing with rice, the vitamin C iron-absorption trick, and an interactive calculator to build your bowl.

## Plant powered poler

[The Plant-Powered Poler: How to Hit Your Protein Goals on a Vegan Diet — Pole Peak](https://polepeak.com/plant-powered-poler): A science-backed guide for vegan pole dancers to build muscle, optimize recovery, and calculate their daily protein targets using whole foods.
